hero_subtitle: SFTY Business automates KYT alert triage by connecting transaction risk data, wallet screening, and compliance workflows while enabling human review of high-risk cases.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Alert triage depends on manual review
problem_description: Compliance teams face slow alert processing when transaction monitoring outputs remain isolated and uncoordinated. This creates duplication, inconsistent risk context, and weak traceability between wallet risks, alerts, and case follow-up.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet risk signals, transaction alerts, provider data and reviewer actions into structured cases so compliance teams can efficiently prioritize and audit alert investigations.
workflow_title: From wallet risk alerts to cases
workflow_description: SFTY collects wallet risk signals, routes alerts for triage, opens cases for detailed review, records decisions, and preserves evidence for compliance reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond alert overload. One operational layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented KYT alerts into structured case workflows with linked decisions, evidence, and audit-ready trails without replacing existing analytics providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with provider-neutral orchestration, audit-grade evidence preservation and enterprise deployment for scalable, defensible KYT alert triage and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support automated alert triage workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction alerts are connected to case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved during alert reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for scalable alert triage automation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet risk, transaction alerts, provider outputs and internal rules into structured compliance workflows for efficient and auditable review by compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support alert triage workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automates alert triage by prioritizing and routing alerts based on risk rules while preserving human oversight for high-risk or complex cases.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records case details, decision logs and supporting evidence in a consistent, auditable format to support inspection readiness and regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY works above existing KYT and blockchain analytics providers, integrating their outputs into connected review workflows without requiring system replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT and analytics providers, connecting their outputs into cases, evidence and reports rather than replacing their functionality.
final_title: Connect KYT alerts into structured review workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes wallet risk and transaction alerts into cases, decisions, evidence and controlled compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
